name: aukora
description: Aukora canonical portable core: a deterministic authority kernel, EvidencePack validation, and an advisory multi-model council. Library packages only — no applications, no organism.
author: Aumara

scripts.boundary: node scripts/check-canonical-boundary.mjs --src packages/evidence/src && node scripts/check-canonical-boundary.mjs --src packages/council/src && node scripts/check-canonical-boundary.mjs --src packages/council-node/src
scripts.test:kernel: npm run test:portable-boundary && npm run typecheck:kernel && npm test --workspace @aukora/kernel && npm run build:kernel && npm run verify:kernel-compatibility && npm run verify:kernel-sbom && npm run verify:kernel-runtimes && npm run verify:kernel-package
scripts.test:all: npm run verify:provenance && npm run boundary && npm run test && npm run test:kernel
